metadata.description: Official Apify Agent Skills for web scraping, data extraction, and automation

plugins.name: apify-ultimate-scraper
plugins.description: Universal AI-powered web scraper for 55+ platforms. Scrape data from Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, YouTube, Google Maps, Google Search, Google Trends, Booking.com, TripAdvisor, Amazon, Walmart, eBay, and more for lead generation, brand monitoring, competitor analysis, influencer discovery, trend research, content analytics, audience analysis, e-commerce pricing, and reviews

plugins.name: apify-actor-development
plugins.description: Develop, debug, and deploy Apify Actors - serverless cloud programs for web scraping, automation, and data processing

plugins.name: apify-actorization
plugins.description: Convert existing projects into Apify Actors - serverless cloud programs. Actorize JavaScript/TypeScript (SDK with Actor.init/exit), Python (async context manager), or any language (CLI wrapper)

plugins.name: apify-generate-output-schema
plugins.description: Generate output schemas (dataset_schema.json, output_schema.json, key_value_store_schema.json) for an Apify Actor by analyzing its source code

plugins.name: apify-actor-commands
plugins.description: Commands for Apify Actor development workflow
